Do not include a QA note when no issue is observed.

# QA Testing Plan - Pawfect Match

## Tasks:
- [ ] Initialize todo.md
- [ ] Test 'Max distance' filter: 'Within 3 miles'
- [ ] Test 'Max distance' filter: 'Within 8 miles'
- [ ] Test 'Max distance' filter: 'Within 15 miles'
- [ ] Test 'Dog size' filter
- [ ] Test 'Energy vibe' filter
